name: Tail base
rig: Root tail mesh. Bind to body and rotate with delayed follow.

name: Tail middle band
rig: Independent middle tail band for secondary curl deformation.

name: Tail tip
rig: Curl tip. Use smaller mesh and higher delayed spring than base.

name: Left outer ear
rig: Rotate at lower inner base. Keep behind head base.

name: Right outer ear
rig: Rotate at lower inner base. Mirror left ear rig.

name: Left inner ear
rig: Nested under outer ear. Subtle compression during ear twitch.

name: Right inner ear
rig: Nested under outer ear. Mirror left inner ear.

name: Body base
rig: Main torso mesh. Breathing expands vertically and slightly laterally.

name: Body side shadow
rig: Dark side form. Keep as separate multiply-like layer for body turn.

name: Chest patch
rig: Chest patch should lag behind torso only very slightly.

name: Left back paw
rig: Back paw anchors pet on the desktop. Minimal motion.

name: Right back paw
rig: Back paw anchors pet on the desktop. Mirror left.

name: Keyboard shadow
rig: Grounding shadow. Do not bind to key press.

name: Keyboard body
rig: Rigid prop mesh with slight bounce during typing.

name: Keyboard key 01
rig: Individual key layer for rhythmic typing highlights.

name: Keyboard key 02
rig: Individual key layer for rhythmic typing highlights.

rig: Individual key layer for rhythmic typing highlights.

rig: Individual key layer for rhythmic typing highlights.

name: Keyboard key 12
rig: Primary paw strike key. Give this key the strongest press curve.

name: Keyboard key 13
rig: Primary paw strike key. Give this key the strongest press curve.

rig: Individual key layer for rhythmic typing highlights.

name: Left front paw
rig: Typing paw. Rotate down onto left home keys, with squash at contact.

name: Right front paw
rig: Typing paw. Alternate with left paw on typing_sync motion.

name: Head base
rig: Main face mesh. Use ParamAngleX/Y/Z and keep muzzle/eyes as children.

name: Left cheek fur
rig: Small cheek silhouette pieces. Follow head angle, tiny squash on smile.

name: Right cheek fur
rig: Mirror cheek silhouette.

name: Forehead tuft
rig: Hair tuft. Add delayed wobble for head motion.

name: Muzzle
rig: Soft muzzle patch. Minor Y squash on mouth open.

name: Nose
rig: Tiny nose. Follow muzzle, no independent mesh needed.

name: Mouth
rig: Smile curve. Add open-mouth replacement art if voice/TTS is added.

name: Left eye white
rig: Eye white. Mask iris and highlight inside this boundary.

name: Right eye white
rig: Eye white. Mirror left eye.

name: Left iris
rig: Iris should move inside eye mask with eyeball params.

name: Right iris
rig: Mirror iris movement.

name: Left eye highlight
rig: Highlight follows iris at 60 percent strength.

name: Right eye highlight
rig: Mirror highlight.

name: Left eyelid
rig: Upper lid. Closes downward on ParamEyeLOpen.

name: Right eyelid
rig: Upper lid. Mirror left lid.

name: Left brow
rig: Soft expression brow. Keep subtle.

name: Right brow
rig: Mirror brow.

name: Left blush
rig: Expression tint. Fade for happy/break.

name: Right blush
rig: Mirror expression tint.

name: Left whiskers
rig: Three-stroke whisker layer. Keep vector-like and thin.

name: Right whiskers
rig: Mirror whiskers.
